# LABEL_CONTENT

**Database:** Operational

**Description:** Stores the various LABEL_CONTENTs generated by LABEL_CONTENT components.

## Columns

| Name | Data Type | Nullable | Default | Primary | FK To | Description |
|------|-----------|----------|---------|---------|-------|-------------|
| Container | NVARCHAR(40) | True |  | False | CONTAINER | Container for which label is to be printed for references to CONTAINER table. |
| DispatchDate | DATETIME | True |  | False |  | Material Dispatch date. |
| ExpirationDate | DATETIME | True |  | False |  | Latest date of use. |
| Facility | NVARCHAR(40) | True |  | False | FACILITY | Facility to which label is printed for references to FACILITY table. |
| GrossWeight | DECIMAL(28,10) | True |  | False |  | Gross Wieght value. |
| ID | INT(10,0) | False |  | True |  | Unique identifier of a record (key) in a table. |
| LabelNumber | NVARCHAR(40) | False |  | False |  | User-defined Label Number to group labels together. |
| LabelStatus | INT(10,0) | True |  | False | LABEL_STATUS | Label status refernced to LABEL_STATUS table. |
| LanguageID | INT(10,0) | True |  | False |  | LanguageID of the label layout. |
| LotNo | NVARCHAR(40) | True |  | False | LOT_NO | Lot No to which label is printed for. |
| NetWeight | DECIMAL(28,10) | True |  | False |  | Net Wegiht Value. |
| NumberOfUnits | INT(10,0) | True |  | False |  | Number of packages within one transport unit. |
| OrderLineNo | INT(10,0) | True |  | False | ORDER_DETAIL | Supplier delivery order line number. |
| OrderNo | NVARCHAR(20) | True |  | False | ORDER_DETAIL | Supplier delivery order number. |
| OrderType | SMALLINT(5,0) | True |  | False | ORDER_DETAIL | Supplier delivery order Type number |
| PackagingInstructionID | INT(10,0) | True |  | False | PACKAGING_INSTR_HEADER | Packaging instruction ID of the product on the label. |
| ParentLabelID | INT(10,0) | True |  | False | LABEL_CONTENT | Parent Label Identifier linked to this same table. |
| PartnerAddressID | INT(10,0) | True |  | False | PARTNER_ADDRESS | Partner address identifier to which label is being shipped to references to PARTNER_ADDRESS table. |
| PartnerID | INT(10,0) | True |  | False | PARTNER_ADDRESS | Partner identifier to which label is being linked to references to PARTNER table. |
| ProductID | INT(10,0) | True |  | False | LOT_NO | Product Id to which label is printed for linke to Product table. |
| ProductionDate | DATETIME | True |  | False |  | Material production date. |
| Quantity | DECIMAL(28,10) | True |  | False |  | Quantity of material on the label. |
| ReportClassName | NVARCHAR(50) | True |  | False |  | Reference to the Name column in the REPORT_CLASS table. |
| ReportFUID | NVARCHAR(36) | True |  | False |  | Reference to the FUID column in the REPORT table. |
| SerialNo | NVARCHAR(40) | True |  | False | SERIAL_NO | SerialNo to which label is printed for references to SERIAL_NO table. |
| UnitID | INT(10,0) | True |  | False | UNIT | Unique identifier of the Unit. |
| UomCode | NVARCHAR(10) | True |  | False | UOM | UOM for the quantity, link to UOM table. |
| UserField1 | NVARCHAR(40) | True |  | False |  | Additional label field. |
| UserField10 | NVARCHAR(40) | True |  | False |  | Additional label field. |
| UserField11 | NVARCHAR(40) | True |  | False |  | Additional label field. |
| UserField12 | NVARCHAR(40) | True |  | False |  | Additional label field. |
| UserField13 | NVARCHAR(40) | True |  | False |  | Additional label field. |
| UserField14 | NVARCHAR(40) | True |  | False |  | Additional label field. |
| UserField15 | NVARCHAR(40) | True |  | False |  | Additional label field. |
| UserField2 | NVARCHAR(40) | True |  | False |  | Additional label field. |
| UserField3 | NVARCHAR(40) | True |  | False |  | Additional label field. |
| UserField4 | NVARCHAR(40) | True |  | False |  | Additional label field. |
| UserField5 | NVARCHAR(40) | True |  | False |  | Additional label field. |
| UserField6 | NVARCHAR(40) | True |  | False |  | Additional label field. |
| UserField7 | NVARCHAR(40) | True |  | False |  | Additional label field. |
| UserField8 | NVARCHAR(40) | True |  | False |  | Additional label field. |
| UserField9 | NVARCHAR(40) | True |  | False |  | Additional label field. |
| WeightUomCode | NVARCHAR(10) | True |  | False | UOM | Unit of measure of weight. |

## Primary Key

- **PK_LABEL_CONTENT** on `ID`

## Foreign Keys (this table -> other)

- **FK_LABEL_CONTENT_Container** — LABEL_CONTENT -> CONTAINER (`Container -> Container`)
- **FK_LABEL_CONTENT_DETAIL** — LABEL_CONTENT -> ORDER_DETAIL (`OrderNo, OrderType, OrderLineNo -> OrderNo, OrderType, OrderLineNo`)
- **FK_LABEL_CONTENT_Facility** — LABEL_CONTENT -> FACILITY (`Facility -> Facility`)
- **FK_LABEL_CONTENT_HEADER** — LABEL_CONTENT -> ORDER_HEADER (`OrderNo, OrderType -> OrderNo, OrderType`)
- **FK_LABEL_CONTENT_LabelStatus** — LABEL_CONTENT -> LABEL_STATUS (`LabelStatus -> LabelStatus`)
- **FK_LABEL_CONTENT_LotNo** — LABEL_CONTENT -> LOT_NO (`LotNo, ProductID -> LotNo, ProductID`)
- **FK_LABEL_CONTENT_PackagingInstructionID** — LABEL_CONTENT -> PACKAGING_INSTR_HEADER (`PackagingInstructionID -> ID`)
- **FK_LABEL_CONTENT_ParentLabelID** — LABEL_CONTENT -> LABEL_CONTENT (`ParentLabelID -> ID`)
- **FK_LABEL_CONTENT_PartnerAddressID** — LABEL_CONTENT -> PARTNER_ADDRESS (`PartnerID, PartnerAddressID -> PartnerID, AddressID`)
- **FK_LABEL_CONTENT_PartnerID** — LABEL_CONTENT -> PARTNER (`PartnerID -> ID`)
- **FK_LABEL_CONTENT_ProductID** — LABEL_CONTENT -> PRODUCT (`ProductID -> ID`)
- **FK_LABEL_CONTENT_SerialNo** — LABEL_CONTENT -> SERIAL_NO (`SerialNo, ProductID -> SerialNo, ProductID`)
- **FK_LABEL_CONTENT_UnitID** — LABEL_CONTENT -> UNIT (`UnitID -> ID`)
- **FK_LABEL_CONTENT_UomCode** — LABEL_CONTENT -> UOM (`UomCode -> UomCode`)
- **FK_LABEL_CONTENT_WeightUomCode** — LABEL_CONTENT -> UOM (`WeightUomCode -> UomCode`)

## Referenced By (other tables -> this)

- **FK_LABEL_CONTENT_ParentLabelID** — LABEL_CONTENT -> LABEL_CONTENT (`ParentLabelID -> ID`)

- **** on ``
